title: ischyrolepis paludosa
intro: Ischyrolepis paludosa, also known as marsh fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Isoetaceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Ischyrolepis paludosa include alleviating coughs, bronchitis, and asthma, as well as its potential to reduce fever and inflammation. Herbal preparations of Ischyrolepis paludosa can be found in various forms, including infusions, decoctions, and poultices, which are often used in traditional medicine.
